title: TOP-VIGOR 3pcs 48x27x14mm Mini Dustproof Electrical Junction Box, ABS Plastic Project Boxes for DIY Electronics Projects, Indoor Power Module Case, Instrument Case Box, Black
features: 【Size and Package】External Size: 48x27x14mm; Internal Size: 44x24x10mm. Package includes 3pcs Enclosure Cases.

【Durable ABS Construction】Crafted from premium ABS plastic, these electronic enclosures are long-lasting and offer solid protection for the components. Flame-retardant and electrically insulated, ideal for electric controlling, transmission, other maintenance and operation applications.
【Effective Sealing】The tight-sealing structure helps guard against dust, corrosion and light moisture. The small size enclosure case is suitable for indoor use.

【Quick Assembly】1. Assemble the circuit board or switch in the junction box; 2. Confirm the size of the your wire hole and the switch hole, then drill the hole; 3. Snap the cover to seal the box. Note: This plastic electrical enclosure case without any reserved installed wiring hole, please drill holes as needed.

【Various Application】Widely used for the Suitable for airport, subway station, button box, small terminal, signal chassis, sensor, measuring device, communication junction box and other equipments. The junction box is ideal for portable electronic projects, battery powered projects and other small electronic DIY projects.
description: Product Description TOP-VIGOR mini dustproof electrical junction box, flame-retardant and electrically insulated. Flame-retardant ABS Material Made of high quality ABS material, the plastic project box is durable, flame-retardant and electrically insulated, offering solid protection for the components. Tight-sealing Structure The electronic enclosure has good sealing effect, guarding against dust, corrosion and light moisture. It can protect your instrument even in harsh environments. Easy Installation Just snap the cover to seal the box. And you can drill installed wiring holes as needed. Wide Applications Widely used for the Suitable for airport, subway station, button box, small terminal, signal chassis, sensor, measuring device, communication junction box and other equipments.
